judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent computed CDH1 mutation rates by intersecting BRCA-alive patients from clinical_info with CDH1 mutations from Mutation_Data but failed to filter mutations for reliability (e.g., FILTER='PASS') in query_db:28, leading to overcounted mutated patients (e.g., 90 vs 74 for Infiltrating Lobular Carcinoma) and inflated percentages in execute_python:30.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
Although the agent correctly queried BRCA alive clinical records (query_db:42) and CDH1 mutation barcodes (query_db:60), every subsequent execute_python attempt to join and compute mutation rates failed due to syntax errors and mis-handled storage variables (e.g., execute_python:46, :62), so it returned unsupported, incorrect percentages and rankings.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent built the correct mapping of alive BRCA patients to histological types but then queried CDH1 mutations (query_db:40) using only a truncated subset of barcodes taken from a preview (execute_python:38) instead of the full set (execute_python:30/34), leading to severe undercounting and returning only two histologies instead of the top three.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent implemented a correct approach but, in the final mutation query (query_db:36), it manually used an incomplete IN list of alive patient barcodes derived from the clinical data (query_db:26) instead of all 937 barcodes, leading to a severe undercount of CDH1-mutated patients and thus incorrect top-three histological types.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent misinterpreted BRCA as bladder cancer and consequently filtered for TCGA-BL patients (queries 24/26 and extraction in execute_python:30) and searched CDH1 mutations among TCGA-BL barcodes (query 34), leading to empty results instead of selecting breast cancer patients, so the final answer was incorrect.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
